calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day or Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225.
Curtis E. Smolar, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Charles Communications Associates, LLC.
Kimberly Charles was placed under oath and testified for plaintiff Charles Communications Associates, LLC.
No appearance by defendants Wine Fritz, Inc., Wine Fritz, LLC, Shari Scholten or Tom Scholten.

Defaults entered against defendants on 07/26/07.
Doe defendants dismissed today, February 28, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Charles Communication Associates, LLC and against the Defaulted Defendants Wine Fritz, Inc., Wine Fritz, LLC, Shari Scholten and Tom Scholten as follows:

Damages/Principal - $16,175.22.
Prejudgment Interest -1,824.29.
Attorney's Fees - $4,139.00.
Costs - $597.50, for a total of $22,736.01.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
